pegiDescription3: Content suitable for all ages. No violence or inappropriate language.
pegiDescription7: May contain scenes or sounds that can frighten young children.
pegiDescription12: May include non-realistic violence towards fantasy characters or mild realistic violence.
pegiDescription16: May contain realistic violence, strong language or mild sexual content.
pegiDescription18: Adult content. May include intense violence, strong language, explicit sexual content, or drug use.
pegiDescriptionUnknown: No description available for this PEGI rating.
